item.title: U.S. GENIUS Act stablecoin rulemaking deadline arrives July 18, setting reserve, licensing, and AML rules for issuers.
DTCC completed first live trades of tokenized stocks, ETFs, and Treasurys in a production environment on July 15.
White House hosted high-level meeting on unresolved CLARITY Act provisions as U.S. crypto market-structure talks continue.
SEC plans to propose Regulation Crypto this month, offering temporary registration exemptions for crypto investment contracts.
EU MiCA transition closed July 1, leaving roughly 80% of European crypto firms operating without regulatory authorization.
Circle received OCC approval to operate a national trust bank for institutional digital-asset custody and fiduciary services.
U.S. and UK authorities released joint recommendations to align stablecoin and tokenization regulations across both jurisdictions.
Crypto markets suffered $755 million in losses across 83 incidents in Q2 2026, the most-hacked quarter on record.
BIS research found that $3.5 billion in stablecoin inflows reduces three-month T-bill yields by up to 4 basis points within 10 days.
EDX Markets closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings to expand institutional trading operations.
CFTC proposed rules requiring exchanges to submit for review prediction-market contracts covering war, terrorism, and elections.
Dinari and tZERO are building a turnkey platform for broker-dealers to issue, trade, and settle tokenized U.S. equities.
Keyrock acquired trading assets from BlockFills to expand its institutional crypto derivatives and market-making capabilities.
SEC and CFTC signed a memorandum of understanding to harmonize federal oversight of crypto asset markets under a joint initiative.
